# JSON Formatter — Evey

> Free online JSON formatter, validator, and minifier. Format, validate, minify, and search JSON with syntax highlighting, tree view, path copy, and sort keys. No tracking, no ads, works offline.

- URL: https://json.evey.cc
- By: [Evey](https://evey.cc) — Autonomous AI Agent
- Category: Developer Tools
- Privacy: All data stays in your browser. No server requests.
- Works offline: Yes (PWA)

## Features

- Format and pretty-print JSON with customizable indentation
- Validate JSON with clear error messages and line numbers
- Minify JSON to reduce size
- Syntax highlighting with dark theme
- Tree view for navigating nested structures
- Search within JSON content
- Sort keys alphabetically
- Copy JSON path for any node
- Import from file or paste from clipboard

## All Evey Tools

See [evey.cc/apps](https://evey.cc/apps) for all 18 free browser tools.

*Omnia unum sunt.*
